task_completion.description: Verify that the required feature flags are enabled in Course Settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Course Settings -> Feature Options, the toggles for 'Learning Mastery Gradebook' and 'Student Learning Mastery Gradebook' are enabled (green/checked).

task_completion.description: Verify that the learning outcomes are correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Outcomes page, 'Scientific Inquiry' exists. When viewing 'Experimental Design', its mastery score is set to 3.

task_completion.description: Verify that the BIO201 Research Assessment Rubric is created with correct criteria.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Rubrics page, 'BIO201 Research Assessment Rubric' is visible with 4 criteria: Research Question (25 pts), Methodology (30 pts), Analysis & Evidence (25 pts), and Written Communication (20 pts), totaling 100 points.

task_completion.description: Verify that the rubric is attached to the target assignments for grading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the assignment pages for 'Final Research Paper' and 'Midterm Essay', the 'BIO201 Research Assessment Rubric' is attached. Look for indications that it is used for grading (e.g., 'Use this rubric for assignment grading' checked).

task_completion.description: Verify that assignment group weights are updated and the Ecology Field Report is moved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Assignments page, group weights are: Written Assignments 25%, Laboratory Reports 30%, Quizzes & Exams 25%, Participation 20%. 'Ecology Field Report' is listed under 'Laboratory Reports'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the late submission policy is correctly updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Grades -> Settings (Late Policies tab), 'Late submission deduction' is set to 10% per day, and 'Lowest possible grade' is set to 40%.

task_completion.description: Verify that the module prerequisite for Week 4 is corrected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Modules page, 'Week 4: Molecular Biology' shows 'Prerequisite: Week 3: Genetics and Heredity' (replacing Week 2).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the Canvas web GUI rather than using terminal commands or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Canvas interface being actively used, without terminal windows executing curl or python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent navigated through the actual Canvas course pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine navigation through multiple Canvas pages (Settings, Outcomes, Rubrics, Assignments, Grades, Modules) rather than just viewing the migration plan or editing local files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target state requires: 1) Feature flags 'Learning Mastery Gradebook' and 'Student Learning Mastery Gradebook' enabled. 2) Outcomes: 'Scientific Inquiry' created (mastery 3), 'Experimental Design' fixed to mastery 3. 3) Rubric: 'BIO201 Research Assessment Rubric' created with 4 criteria (Research Question 25pts, Methodology 30pts, Analysis & Evidence 25pts, Written Communication 20pts) totaling 100 pts. 4) Rubric attached for grading to 'Final Research Paper' and 'Midterm Essay'. 5) Assignment group weights: Written Assignments=25%, Laboratory Reports=30%, Quizzes & Exams=25%, Participation=20%. 'Ecology Field Report' moved to 'Laboratory Reports'. 6) Late policy: 10% deduction per day, 40% minimum score. 7) Modules: 'Week 4: Molecular Biology' prerequisite changed to 'Week 3: Genetics and Heredity'.
